source:
* BQ24074 behavioral transient macromodel for ngspice/PSpice-style ABM
* Derived from TI BQ2407x datasheet SLUS810N electrical characteristics and figures.
* Scope: OUT regulation, BAT regulation, charge-current taper, DPPM reduction,
* and battery supplement. Default currents are set for Figure 9-5 style testing.
* Not modeled: timers, TS temperature faults, thermal regulation dynamics, startup fault latches.
.SUBCKT BQ24074_TRANS TS BAT N_CE EN2 EN1 N_PGOOD VSS N_CHG OUT ILIM IN TMR ITERM ISET EP
.PARAM VBATREG=4.2 VLOWV=3.0 VOUTREG=4.4 VDPPM=4.3 ICHG=0.5 ILIMAX=0.9
R_ISET_BIAS ISET VSS 1MEG
R_ILIM_BIAS ILIM VSS 1MEG
R_TS_LEAK TS VSS 100MEG
R_TMR_LEAK TMR VSS 100MEG
R_ITERM_LEAK ITERM VSS 100MEG
R_EP EP VSS 1M
E_OUTDRV OUT_DRV VSS VALUE { VOUTREG*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-3.4)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-V(BAT,VSS)-0.055)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((10.5-V(IN,VSS))/0.02,0,1) + LIMIT(V(BAT,VSS)-0.05,0,VBATREG)*(1-LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-3.4)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-V(BAT,VSS)-0.055)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((10.5-V(IN,VSS))/0.02,0,1)) }
G_OUT OUT VSS VALUE { -LIMIT(V(OUT_DRV,OUT)/0.02,-0.01,ILIMAX) }
G_BSUP BAT OUT VALUE { LIMIT((VDPPM-V(OUT,VSS))/0.7,0,0.3) }
R_OUT_BLEED OUT VSS 10MEG
C_OUT_DAMP OUT VSS 10U
G_CHG VSS BAT VALUE { LIMIT(ICHG*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-3.4)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-V(BAT,VSS)-0.055)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((10.5-V(IN,VSS))/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((0.8-V(N_CE,VSS))/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((VBATREG-V(BAT,VSS))/0.15,0,1)*LIMIT((V(OUT,VSS)-V(BAT,VSS))/(VDPPM-V(BAT,VSS)+0.01),0,1),0,ILIMAX) }
E_PGOOD_CTL PGOOD_CTL VSS VALUE { LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-3.4)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((V(IN,VSS)-V(BAT,VSS)-0.055)/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((10.5-V(IN,VSS))/0.02,0,1) }
S_PGOOD N_PGOOD VSS PGOOD_CTL VSS SW_OD_ON_HIGH
E_CHG_CTL CHG_CTL VSS VALUE { LIMIT((0.8-V(N_CE,VSS))/0.02,0,1)*LIMIT((VBATREG-0.01-V(BAT,VSS))/0.02,0,1) }
S_CHG N_CHG VSS CHG_CTL VSS SW_OD_ON_HIGH
.MODEL SW_OD_ON_HIGH SW(Roff=100MEG Ron=20 Vt=0.5 Vh=0.3)
.ENDS BQ24074_TRANS
